title: Pass-local memo for review-candidate git derivation (D2)
action: Per CONTEXT D2 (profiling: deriveCandidateStatus ~212ms, up to 2 git spawns per candidate x covering-session with zero caching; reviews.mjs:400,410,423). ARCHITECTURE (plan-check BLOCKER resolution): the repeats are CROSS-CANDIDATE — within one deriveCandidateStatus call each head is distinct, so the memo MUST be born in the candidate LOOPS in bee.mjs (buildReviewBlock ~:252 and buildReviewsStatusSummary ~:2458) and threaded into deriveCandidateStatus(root, candidate, {sessions, gitMemo}) via the existing opts param; reviews.mjs's runGit/headCoveredBy/commitsSince accept the memo (Map keyed (head,ref) for headCoveredBy, (ref) for commitsSince). RED-FIRST: extend skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_reviews.mjs with (a) fixture where multiple candidates share the same covering-session head -> underlying git runner invoked at most once per unique key per PASS (count via injected runner), (b) derived statuses unchanged vs pre-change frozen expectations, (c) unresolvable-ancestry degradation unchanged; run red against unmodified code, record --passed false, then implement. Memo NEVER outlives the pass. Mirror all 4 files (reviews.mjs + bee.mjs, templates + .bee/bin), render + manifest. Record before/after `bee reviews status --json` and `bee status --json` wall (advisory).

truths: at most one git invocation per unique (head, ref) pair per derivation pass (asserted via injected runner on fixture)
derived candidate statuses unchanged on fixtures incl. the degraded unresolvable path
RED-FIRST failing run recorded before implementation
prohibitions: No cross-call/persistent cache, no TTL (pass-local Map only)
Never change what a status derives to — only how many times git is asked
